testcase.name: test_add_basic
testcase.failure:
def test_add_basic(): > assert add(2, 3) == 5 E assert -1 == 5 E + where -1 = add(2, 3)
test_buggy.py:9: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_add_negative
testcase.failure:
def test_add_negative(): > assert add(-2, 3)== 1 E assert -5 == 1 E + where -5 = add(-2, 3)
test_buggy.py:15: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_subtract_basic
testcase.failure:
def test_subtract_basic(): > assert subtract(3, 1) == 2 E assert 4 == 2 E + where 4 = subtract(3, 1)
test_buggy.py:18: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_subtract_negative
testcase.failure:
def test_subtract_negative(): > assert subtract(4, -9) == 13 E assert -5 == 13 E + where -5 = subtract(4, -9)
test_buggy.py:24: AssertionError
